## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run stylelint` pass
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (add/update tests for the change if applicable)
- [ ] Verified the change in a browser (`npm run dev` / `npm run preview`) if it touches UI
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
